# velia_customer_contact (Resource)

Creates a customer contact in Velia.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "velia_customer_contact" "test" {
  email = "user@example.com"
  type  = "billing"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) Contact email address.
- `type` (String) Contact type, for example billing or technical.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Contact ID returned by Velia.
